tools.name: Telemetry Spec Generator
tools.description: Auto-generates SQL analytical telemetry logging specs from product requirement narratives.

tools.name: Star Story Builder
tools.description: Refines raw experience logs into high-impact STAR behavioral interview stories.

tools.name: ATS CV Parser
tools.description: Scans draft resume text against target PM job descriptions to pinpoint skill match gaps.

prompts.title: SQL Telemetry Log Spec
prompts.template: Write a telemetry database event log schema for tracking [feature name]. The spec must include database table columns, triggering events, constraints, and mock query validation.
prompts.description: Generates analytical telemetry logging schemas directly mapped for product and data engineers.

prompts.title: Business Requirements Document to User Stories
prompts.template: Analyze this business requirement brief and convert it into a structured set of 5-8 User Stories. Each story must have clear Acceptance Criteria in Given-When-Then format.
prompts.description: Translates high-level BA requirement briefs into actionable developer tickets.

prompts.title: PM Behavioral STAR Interview Refiner
prompts.template: I want to explain a time where I [describe situation]. Reframe this raw narrative into a Situation, Task, Action, and Result (STAR) structure highlighting product decisions and cross-functional leadership.
prompts.description: Reconstructs business analyst operational achievements into high-value PM metrics.

prompts.title: Now-Next-Later Roadmap Structurer
prompts.template: I have these 10 feature backlog items: [list features]. Categorize them into a Now-Next-Later prioritization framework based on ease of implementation and high customer impact.
prompts.description: Assists in early-stage strategic planning and backlog organization.

workflows.name: BA Requirement to Engineering Sizing Sync

steps.name: ATS CV Parser
steps.description: Extract raw system requirements and telemetry hooks.

steps.name: Story Converter
steps.description: Auto-generate developer user stories with acceptance criteria.

steps.name: Slack Alert
steps.description: Send formatted backlog tickets directly to engineering leads.

steps.name: STAR Story Builder
steps.description: Extract PM metrics from experience milestones.

steps.name: Voice Practice Guide
steps.description: Generate behavioral interview questions based on the STAR outputs.

learningTimeline.description: Completed advanced prompt engineering course focusing on LLM system parameters, chain-of-thought, and few-shot templates.
Deployed automated workflow to convert raw telemetry request docs into validated database mapping specs.
